title: MineBlaBla
description: Modpack originally made for the Bla Bla Community server, an adventure/farming focused pack with some building.
body:
Whether you're planting your first crops, raising animals, exploring ancient ruins, or cooking a feast for your crew, this pack offers everything you need to build a beautiful, immersive, and rewarding Minecraft experience. Explore the world of Minecraft 1.20.1 with a modpack designed just for survival players seeking a fluid and streamlined experience. This modpack has been carefully curated to retain the challenging nature of survival, while also adding modules focused on performance optimization, ensuring smooth gameplay even in the most stressful scenarios. Immerse yourself in thrilling adventures without fear of lag, and experience how survival can be even more rewarding in a world that responds promptly to your orders.

This isn’t a typical tech-focused modpack.
Here, life is slower.
More rewarding.
More grounded.

This modpack is designed for players who wish to participate in the Brazilian server "Bla Bla." With a variety of optimizations and customizations configured by default, it aims to make it easier for new players to join the server.

Who should use this modpack? While everyone is welcome to use and suggest changes or additions to the modpack, it will always focus on improving the experience for players on the specific server it was created for. Although it works perfectly well in singleplayer mode, some options may have been disabled to optimize the multiplayer experience, making it less ideal for solo play.

The modpack is officially maintained and updated by the in-game server moderators, with all updates and changes announced on the appropriate Discord channels as well as in changelogs on platforms like Modrinth.

Sit back and Relax!
